_note: HARVESTED from hyperfocus-constellation (the 2026 SVG prototype). These are FACTS (repo, category, description, colour) rescued from the old hardcoded roster - NOT lore. The merge layer uses this as a FALLBACK so that every repo gets a biome and a colour even before you hand-write its lore. Upgrade any entry by adding a full lore.json entry with the same repoId; lore.json always wins.
_biomeMapNote: 12 old categories folded into your 6 existing biomes. Four are a stretch and are yours to re-call: Social->creative-workshop, AI & ML->living-mirror, Neurodivergent Tools->neon-megacity, Special Projects->neon-megacity. If you want new biomes for those, name them yourself - that's lore, not my job.

_dropped: https-github.com-welshDog-HYPERfocusZone-Gemmi-build - the old roster's repo name was a mangled URL, not a real repo slug. Re-add it once you confirm the real name.
_provenInteractions: The old prototype ACTUALLY shipped and worked: hover tooltip, click-to-GitHub, category filter (dim non-matching to 0.2 opacity), live search across name/description/category, zoom slider, portal rotate mode, canvas starfield, tabindex=0 + Enter/Space on each star. That's a validated interaction model - port it to 3D rather than reinventing it. PlanetSheet = the tooltip. FocusControl = the category filter.
_doNotRepeat: The old prototype hardcoded x/y positions per repo. That is why it froze at 24 repos and never grew. Positions in this universe MUST be computed from data (orbit ring by activity, angle by index/hash), never hand-placed.
